episodes.title: Congress questions Bill Gates over Jeffrey Epstein connection
episodes.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is on Capitol Hill answering questions from Congress about his past relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: President Trump announces Pam Bondi is out as attorney general
episodes.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that Pam Bondi is out as his attorney general. The departure followed months of scrutiny over the Epstein files.

episodes.title: Guard working night of Jeffrey Epstein's death to testify before House Oversight Committee
episodes.description: Epstein's death was ruled a suicide, but there has been ongoing speculation that he was killed.

episodes.title: Epstein Files update: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor was arrested at his family's royal estate
episodes.description: The former Prince Andrew was arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office stemming from his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Epstein files update: Global fallout after names released
episodes.description: The fallout from the names in the Epstein files is being felt worldwide.

episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein jail video: New documents show FBI destroyed master copy of surveillance video
episodes.description: New documents show the FBI destroyed its master copy of the surveillance video from the night Jeffrey Epstein died before public demands for its release grew.

episodes.title: Bill, Hillary Clinton refuse to testify in Epstein case
episodes.description: Former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton said they won't comply with a subpoena tied to the Jeffrey Epstein investigation.
